race.description: The Provedores Country Boosted Showcase Hcp (C1)
race.comment: COMIC CULTURE (2) has enjoyed a five-week let-up since closing well to finish second in a Class 2 over 1280m on the Canberra Acton track. Drops back a level today and gets all the favours from the inside alley. Will race handy and give a great sight. HERALD ANGEL (4) has found the line well to fill minor placings at both runs this prep, the latest over 1350m at Casino. Cherry ripe and with a bit of luck from the poor gate she can feature in the finish. ALMOST MAYBE (5) had a month between runs before his eye-catching third over 1215m at this track recently. Strips fitter and is sure to play a key role. UNO FRED (9) made a long run from the tail of the field to finish midfield over 1200m at Tamworth last start. In the mix out to this trip. SATIN AND CASH (7) gets back so might need luck extracting from the fence at some stage. Recent form hard to knock.
